expression.expression: (((SUM(1) OVER (PARTITION BY 1 ORDER BY 1 NULLS FIRST)) % 1000) = 1)

warehouseQuery.query: SELECT GEO_SEGMENT_CODE AS GEO_SEGMENT_CODE,        PARTY_NUM AS PARTY_NUM,        PARTY_ID AS PARTY_ID,        PARTY_ID_TYPE AS PARTY_ID_TYPE,        INTL_REF_NUM AS INTL_REF_NUM,        INTL_REF_ID_TYPE AS INTL_REF_ID_TYPE,        PERS_CMPY_FLG AS PERS_CMPY_FLG FROM (        SELECT M.GEO_SEGMENT_CODE ,        M.PARTY_NUM,        M.PARTY_ID,        M.PARTY_ID_TYPE,        M.INTL_REF_NUM,        M.INTL_REF_ID_TYPE,        M.PERS_CMPY_FLG   FROM    MODEL.DIM_PARTY_SK M        INNER JOIN           (SELECT DISTINCT PARTY_NUM AS PARTY_NUM, GEO_SEGMENT_CODE AS GEO_SEGMENT_CODE , PARTY_ID_TYPE AS PARTY_ID_TYPE FROM STG.P_DIM_PARTY_ADDRESS) S         ON     M.PARTY_NUM = S.PARTY_NUM           AND M.GEO_SEGMENT_CODE = S.GEO_SEGMENT_CODE           AND M.PARTY_ID_TYPE = S.PARTY_ID_TYPE UNION SELECT '-','-',MAX(PARTY_ID),'-','-','-','-' FROM MODEL.DIM_PARTY_SK WHERE PARTY_ID<1000000000) --

expression.expression: (CASE WHEN ((TAX_FILE_NUM IS NULL) OR (CAST((LTRIM((RTRIM(TAX_FILE_NUM)))) AS string) = '')) THEN '-' ELSE TAX_FILE_NUM END)
(CASE WHEN CAST((RLIKE(ADDR_ROLE_CODE, 'PREF\d')) AS BOOLEAN) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
